LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER VLADIMIR NOSACH'S APPLICATION FOR VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED. THE PETITION IS DENIED AND THE MATTER IS REMANDED BACK TO THE ADMINISTRATIVE HEARING. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE MINI-MINUTES AND ORDER FOR COMPLETE RULING.) JUDGE JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER MELANIE GHENO, CSR NO. 7489 (302/JMQ)
